w:r.w:t: KaamSetu connects Employers (Kaam Saheb), Workers (Kaam Saathi), Local Agents (Kaam Setu), and Super Admin into a trusted labor ecosystem ensuring transparency, secure payments, and efficient job allocation across villages and cities.
Kaam Saheb (Employer): Post work, manage jobs, make payments.
Kaam Saathi (Worker): Receive nearby jobs, complete work, receive secure payment.
Kaam Setu (Agent): Assign workers, verify jobs, handle commission & coordination.
Super Admin: System monitoring, approvals, analytics, fraud control.
Authentication handled via JWT & Google OAuth.
